titleStmt.title: SII 5.579: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 579. (A.R. No. 23 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . rājadrājanyammakuṭaśreṇiranne
ṣu śāsanam . Etadrājentracoḷasya para
kesarivarmmaṇaḥ . tiru maṉṉi vaḷara Irunila ma
ṭant Aiyum poṟceyaṟ pāvaiyuñ ci
rttanic celviyu n=ta ṉ perun=te viya
rāki yiṉpuṟa neṭutuya ruḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟai
ñāṭu n tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cu
ḷḷiccūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇakkarumu
raṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭa liḻattaraiyarta muṭiyum
āṅkavaṉ teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavarpakkal
teṉṉavan vaitta cun=ta ramuṭiyum In=ti ranāramu n=te ṇṭirai
yiḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum meṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimayiṟ cūṭum
kulatanamākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatir
velait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palapaḻan=ti vuñ ceruviṟ cinavi lirupat
torukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cāntimaṟṟīvaraṇ karu
ti Iruttiya cempoṟ ṟiruttaru muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika
muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ ṭoḷitta jayaciṅka ṉaḷapperum pukaḻoṭu
piṭiya liraṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamum navanetik kulapperu ma
laikaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakkoṭṭamu mutirvaṭavalla maturamaṇṭa
lamu maṇaikkoṇaiyum veñciṉavirar pañcappaḷ
mācuṇitecamu mayarvil vaṇkirtti yātina
ntirataṉai viḷaiyamark kaḷattu kiḷaiyo
ṟa kulataṉak kuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭarum ceṟi
kocalaināṭuṉ taṉmapālaṉai ve
taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉaiy muṟa
ṇukat ta kirttit takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovin=ta can=ta ṉ māvaḻin
toṭa ttaṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamun toṭukaṭaṟ caṅku voṭṭar payirvāḷa
ṉai veñcamavaḷākat tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir
paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tīrttat
teṟipunaṟ kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuṭ palakalañ celutti ca
[ṅkirāmavija]yottuṅka[ vanma nāṉa kiṭ] Ārattaraiyaṉai vākayam
porukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭut tu rimaiyiṟ piṟakkiya peru
netip piṟakkamu mārttavaṉ kānekap porttoḻil vā
calil viccātiratoraṇamum moyttoḷir puṉamaṇip putava
muṅ kaṉamaṇik katavamum niṟai śrīviṣaiyamu n tuṟainirp paṉṉaiyum poṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻ māyiruṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkā yūre yilaṅ
kācokamuṅ kāppuṟu niṟaipunal māppappāḷamuṅ
ṅ kalaittakkkor pukaḻt talaittakkolamu n=ti tamāvalviṉai mātamaliṅkamuṅ kalāmutir
kaṭuntiṟa lilāmuritecamu n=te ṉakkalarpoḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟkāvaṟ kaṭumura
ṭ kaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecarivarmarā ṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājendracoḷade
vakku yāṇṭu 30 vatu nittavinotavaḷanāṭṭuk kiḻārkkūṟṟattu Āyirattaḷippā
l śrīparān=ta kadevīśvara ttu naṭṭavakkāṇiyum meymaṭṭukkāṇi
yum morviyakkāṇiyu muṉpu kāṇiuṭaiya nittaviṭaṅkaṉ mallaiya
ṉ cettamayil Ivaṉ muṉpaṉupavittavaṇṇame Ivaṉ mayttuṉa
ṉ naṅkān=tarva ṉ Araiyaṉ rājarāja ṉāna muṭikoṇṭacoḻa vācciyamārāya
1 Between lines 35 and 37 a part of the historical introduction is wanting.

ṉukkum Ivaṉ vargga ttārkkum naṭṭavamum meymaṭṭum morviyamum kāṇiyā
kak kuṭuttom kallil veṭṭikkuṭukkaveṉṟu Ikkoyil maṭamuṭaiya brahmaso
mapaṇḍi tarkkum śrīkārya ñ ceyvārkaḷukkum Ittevar patipālamulap paṭṭu
ṭai pañcācāriyar tevakaṉmikaḷukku n=ti ruman=ti ravolai Ayalūraṭi kaṅkaiko
ṇṭacoḻan Eḻuttiṉāl yāṇṭu 2 10 6 vatu (ḷ)ḷ 472 ṉāl(t) tirumukam prasā
da ñ ceytaruḷivarak kalveṭṭiyatu ....
Digital edition of SII 5.579 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
